positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u37,axiom,
    wins(sK0)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    wins(nemesis)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    superhero_movie(sir_digby_chicken_caesar)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    fights(sir_digby,nemesis)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    sir_digby != nemesis).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~fights(X0,X1) | ~wins(X1) | ~wins(X0)).

cnf(u40,negated_conjecture,
    ~wins(sir_digby)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define named_after(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_movie(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define good(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define bad(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
